# infisical_project_identity_provisioning (Resource)

Create and manage project-level machine identities in Infisical. Project-level identities are scoped to a single project and cannot be assigned to other projects. Only Machine Identity authentication is supported for this resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    infisical = {
      # version = <latest version>
      source = "infisical/infisical"
    }
  }
}

provider "infisical" {
  host = "https://app.infisical.com" # Only required if using self hosted instance of Infisical, default is https://app.infisical.com
  auth = {
    universal = {
      client_id     = "<machine-identity-client-id>"
      client_secret = "<machine-identity-client-secret>"
    }
  }
}

resource "infisical_project" "example" {
  name = "example"
  slug = "example"
}

resource "infisical_project_identity_provisioning" "example" {
  project_id            = infisical_project.example.id
  name                  = "my-project-identity"
  has_delete_protection = false

  metadata = [
    {
      key   = "team"
      value = "backend"
    },
    {
      key   = "environment"
      value = "production"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the identity.
- `project_id` (String) The ID of the project that owns this identity.

### Optional

- `has_delete_protection` (Boolean) Whether the identity has delete protection enabled. Defaults to false.
- `metadata` (Attributes Set) The metadata associated with this identity. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metadata))

### Read-Only

- `auth_methods` (List of String) The authentication methods configured for the identity.
- `id` (String) The ID of the project-level identity.

<a id="nestedatt--metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metadata`

Required:

- `key` (String) The key of the metadata entry.
- `value` (String) The value of the metadata entry.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Import a project-level identity using <project_id>,<identity_id>
terraform import infisical_project_identity_provisioning.example <project_id>,<identity_id>
```
